svg.text: Every universe IS a black hole from outside
L0: PARENT BH = OUR DYING UNIVERSE
disk disintegrating — matter falling into children
ξ = 0.1582 · σ_conv = 1.086 · T_crossing = 207 GeV · same at every level
L0 dies. Its matter falls into L1. L1 is alive. Accretion disks all the way down.
HOW TO SEE THE REAL STRUCTURE
This image abstracts away one dimension so you can see a single funnel.
Look at this image of overlapping black hole disks.
Put it in your mind and make the disks into overlapping spheres.
Put the spheres inside the mothers instead of overlapping — but smaller.
Turn each nested sphere into a funnel, just like the one you are looking at.
